messages.text:
OFFER: price=40
I propose to sell 1 unit of X for 40 ZUP. This is the minimum price I am willing to accept based on my production cost.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:

<my resources> X: 1 </my resources>
<my goals> Sell resources for <ZUP>. It costed X: 40 ZUP to produce the resources </my goals>
<reason> I want to sell my one unit of X for at least 40 ZUP, since that is my production cost. I will propose a trade where Player BLUE gives me 40 ZUP for 1 X. </reason>
<player answer> PROPOSAL </player answer>

messages.text:
ACCEPT: price=40
I accept your offer to sell 1 unit of X for 40 ZUP. This is a fair price and within my budget.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count> 1 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The seller's minimum price is 40 ZUP, which is well below my maximum willingness to pay of 100 ZUP. This is a good deal for me, so I will accept the trade. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> I accept your offer to sell 1 unit of X for 40 ZUP. This is a fair price and within my budget. </message>
